_comment: Merge each block into the matching committed MCP config: `claude` -> .mcp.json mcpServers, `cursor` -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, `codex_toml` -> append to .codex/config.toml. Read-only is the DEFAULT: do NOT add --read-write. Point --db-path at your local .duckdb file; for MotherDuck cloud see SETUP.md.
